programme.title: Stan Against Evil

programme.title: Stan Against Evil

programme.title: Stan Against Evil
programme.desc: Un autostopista homicida aterroriza Williard's Mill. Stan se amiga con un demonio relajado e intenta encontrar un hechizo capaz de librar las almas capturadas por Constable Eccles.

programme.title: Stan Against Evil

programme.title: Stan Against Evil
programme.desc: La hija de Stan, Denise, sale a cosechar arándanos y vuelve a casa con una mascota nueva: una cabra que resulta ser un demonio antiguo con cuerpo de cabra que quiere muertos a Stan y Denise.

programme.title: Stan Against Evil
programme.desc: Stan, Evie y Denise van a citas rápidas y de pronto encuentran a sus pares perfectos. Sin embargo, descubren que están envejeciendo y debilitándose rápidamente.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore llegan el carnaval. Karime y Potro tienen un momento de mucha intimidad. Un hipnotizador llega a la casa. Nacha tiene sospechas y decide hacerse una prueba de embarazo y una nueva integrante llega a las vacaciones.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.desc: Krystal and Vanessa are forced to go to anger management. Vanessa is working on her issues but Krystal still sees herself as the victim. A package provides hope for the cast and has the possibility of bringing everyone back together in Miami.

programme.title: College Hill

programme.title: College Hill

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A lackadaisical owner may lose more than his Irish pub if Jon isn't able to help him take charge and end the fighting among his bartenders.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Ybor City, Florida, Jon helps rescue a bar owner who made some questionable choices on the theme, decor, and menu in her bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon tries to motivate the inattentive owner of a failing Portland, Oregon, music venue plagued by mismanagement and an ant infestation.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The customers call the shots at a rowdy Staten Island bar where they pour their own drinks and cook their own food, so Jon tries to help the owners retake control.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Vegas bar Kerry's was meant as a gift from a grandpa to his family, but the grandkids' mismanagement threatens to squander everything.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps Justin and Michael, a pair of strippers who own The End Zone bar in Houston, put aside their differences before they lose more than just their shirts.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An inexperienced bar owner calls on Jon after hiring a hard-partying manager with no industry knowledge to run Broadway Club in Tooele, Utah.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Maria Menounos helps Jon scout a deeply indebted L.A. beer bar where the owners are divided about whether to throw in the towel and sell or keep plugging away.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in Albuquerque, New Mexico, to help Commander Rudy and his staff recruit young veterans to become members and inject new life into his VFW Post 6216 bar and hall.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: At an Ann Arbor, MI, college alumni bar, Jon is forced to deal with a hotheaded owner whose fiery temper keeps his staff on edge and his million-dollar debt on ice.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps an owner who battled childhood illness and the loss of his father learn how to run a bar and manage a business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon enlists a failing bar owner's ex-wife and former manager to help get the business back on course.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon challenges the owner of a beer-only bar being undercut by a BYOB liquor policy to harness her redneck ingenuity in order to save her business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: If Jon can't resurrect the menu and whip the staff into shape, then the coastal Massachusetts establishment Libads Bar & Grill will be lost at sea.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Jesse Majors, the beautiful motorcycle racer that Matt fell in love with, returns, putting strain on Matt and Summer’s relationship.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An ad hoc reunion of elite 1950s lifeguards, the "Red Knights," triggers a bar brawl and Ben's resignation. Meanwhile, Mitch helps deliver a baby when the mother goes into premature labor while swimming at the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Baywatch lifeguards travel to San Diego for a week where Summer is haunted by the hotel's legendary ghost. CJ grows attached to an orphaned dolphin at Sea World. And Mitch is stranded at sea with his brother when their sailboat capsizes.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Adrift in the ocean with his semi-conscious brother, Mitch struggles to keep himself and Buzzy alive through the long, cold night. CJ unites an orphaned dolphin with its injured mother, and Summer becomes obsessed with a passionate ghost.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A beautiful woman and her plain sister compete for Mitch's affection with perilous results. Matt confronts the sudden onset of a paralyzing fear of sharks, that may in reality be a far different fear.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An investigative reporter is working on a story which details the sale of U.S. military technology by businessman Edward Falcon. The story is so incriminating that her life is put at risk. Can the Baywatch team help her get out alive?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Country and Western superstar Jessie Lee Harris takes a detour from his concert schedule and pays a visit to Baywatch in search of his estranged wife and son

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When severe cutbacks put the Baywatch lifeguards’ jobs in jeopardy, Matt and Summer volunteer to guard as civilians. But can they convince the county commissioners to increase the budget before lifeguards are laid off?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie Holden spends a week with the Coast Guard to help them crack a dangerous arms smuggling ring.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt doesn't know whose story to believe when he tries to reunite a runaway teen and her frantic father. Meanwhile, Stephanie must choose between Mitch and Scott.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer desperate for a new TV series idea observes a rescue on the Baywatch beach and realizes that a television series based on lifeguarding is perfect, sending Baywatch headquarters into a tizzy.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After a minor earthquake, a geological survey team arrives at Baywatch to place an underwater seismometer in the Malibu fault. Hobie has an argument with his father about his future.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie and the geological team are trapped underwater by a massive earthquake! Hobie's and Jackie's lives hang in the balance. It is up to the Baywatch team to save them before it's too late!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After a recent earthquake which almost took his life, Hobie leaves California to live with his mother in Ohio. When they both show up at headquarters a few weeks later Mitch is surprised, especially when he hears the reason they are there.

programme.desc: Watch historic Bellator 300, headlined by a semifinal matchup in the LWGP between current champion Usman Nurmagomedov vs. former champion Brent Primus

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Undefeated Welterweight Ukrainian champ Yaroslav Amosov puts his belt on the line against Jamaican Jason Jackson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Hollywood, Florida with an explosive night of fights. Champion Eddie Alvarez defends his belt against Lightweight Tournament Winner Michael Chandler in one of Bellator MMA's most epic fights.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Karen writes to Dr. Phil saying her husband mentally abuses her by telling her how fat she is, how terrible she looks, criticizes her makeup, calls her names, tells fat jokes. She hides in a bathroom to eat and he won't touch her "until she loses 200 lbs

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Was this teacher drunk In her elementary school classroom? Listen to what this educator has to say.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: David says daughter, Danielle, 21, is out of control. She's been arrested twice, once for "clocking" a man she was dating in the face, & the second for public intoxication. She has violent rages, refuses to take her meds, does drugs, & drives drunk.Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his interview with Heather & Brian, feuding parents over 15-yr-old son Brandon's death. Hear from Brandon's friends, the last to see him alive and two of the young men make shocking allegations against Heather. How does she respond?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Christi says she was an Emmy-winning TV news reporter at the top of her career, but now her struggle with alcohol has left her jobless, homeless and estranged from her two adult daughters. Christi faces her girls for the first time in more than two years.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's Ask Dr. Phil day. Is it an attractive woman's responsibility to tone down her looks on the job? Debrahlee made headlines saying she was fired for being too pretty. She says she was told her figure, pencil skirts & 3-inch heels were too distracting.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Samantha & sister Sarah say mom, Stacy, is a successful teacher & behaviorist, but when it comes to 33-year-old brother, Ben, it's another story. Stacy says teaching Ben how to pay bills and to eat his veggies helps Ben. Ben says he's just stuck in a rut.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Summer Wells, 5, vanished from her Tennessee home, June 15, 2021. Parents Don & Candus claim abduction; online bullies say the opposite. Don & Candus meet with Scott Rouse & Greg Hartley, body language experts who work with the FBI, police and military.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Warren Jeffs, leader of the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day Saints & self-proclaimed prophet, was on the FBI's 10 Most Wanted Fugitives for unlawful flight & sexual conduct with a minor. Dr. Phil talks with FLDS member Willie Jessop.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Cassie insists her teen daughter's behavior is the root cause of her family's dysfunction, not Jonah, her drug & alcohol-addicted husband. Dr. Phil presents Cassie with a difficult choice: pick your children or pick your husband. What will Cassie decide?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jana & Allen say neighbors Maritha & Melanie moved into the neighborhood: police reports, DFS, threats & their 4 dogs bark all hours of the night! Maritha & Melanie point to Jana & Allen, with Melanie being charged with misconduct for mooning a neighbor!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robin & Daniel, both want custody of daughters, Dani, 14, & Zoey, 12, who've been torn between both parents for years. What will happen to Dani and Zoey? Find out as we meet the whole family,to see if they are ready to receive help and move forward.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dan & Teresa say identical twin sons, Dallas & Drew, 16, are violent, destructive & dangerous. What's at the root of the teens' anger & extreme jealousy? Dr. Phil examines the jealousy & torment driving these siblings apart & throwing the home into chaos.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Have you ever looked in the mirror and thought, "If I could lose five more pounds, I'd be perfect"? Darlene and Jennifer have been starving themselves in the name of perfection, but are they also killing themselves on their quest?

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: In an all-new Drew Gooder Drew has a big surprise in store for Deloris "NuNu" and Patrick "PopPop" Hogan who run a safe and reliable 24-hour daycare to help the parents in their community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the hottest headlines in an all-new Drew's News like the study that found laughter can be a giveaway for romantic attraction.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Property Brothers co-hosting continues and they're back at the news desk with Drew and Ross Mathews. Plus, we've got a design duel with The Property Brothers and Brandon Marshall.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Legendary actress and model Pamela Anderson is taking over the whole show and telling Drew all about her career and what she's up to now!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines, covering topics like the woman who found an unusual way to calm her nerves before a first kiss.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Neighborhood" star Cedric the Entertainer is telling Drew about his twenty years of marriage and being back on the road again doing comedy shows.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Abbott Elementary" star Lisa Ann Walter is joining Drew as a co-pilot all show long and talking all about "Abbott Elementary" and working with Lindsay Lohan on "The Parent Trap!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, "Bros" stars Ts Madison, Jim Rash and Miss Lawrence.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Fleishman Is In Trouble" star Jesse Eisenberg shares his thoughts on dating apps, relationships and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chef Remi Cruz is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up some delicious fried mac n' cheese bites. The world's oldest female comedian Dionne Forest is doing a hilarious stand-up set.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Iconic duo and longtime best friends Jane Fonda and Lily Tomlin are chatting with Drew all about meeting her as a kid, their new film, "Moving On," their secrets to a lasting friendship and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to hit the headlines! James Beard Award-winning author Tamar Adler joins Drew andTonyDokoupil in the kitchen to serve up something delicious.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News. Drew chats with "The Fabelmans" star Gabe LaBelle who shares what it was like working with and portraying a young Steven Spielberg. Chef Melissa King joins Drew in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Senator Bernie Sanders is joining Drew to chat about his new book. He's also joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss local Vermont headlines and share some of his favorite Vermont-based small businesses.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Confess Fletch" star and avid dog lover Jon Hamm plays a rousing game of Pup Quiz with Drew and rescue dogs available for adoption.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: All American" star Taye Diggs is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to hit the hottest headlines of the day! Jamila Norman is joining Drew and Taye and sharing tips on how to build your own herb garden.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress and author of the new audiobook, "Inside Voice" Lake Bell stops by to chat.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Last Thing He Told Me" star Jennifer Garner is getting a big birthday surprise from Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: In an all-new Drew Gooder, Drew is surprising a deserving nurse and retired postal worker who founded a local chapter of non-profit to help underserved communities receive free or low-cost medical care.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews dive into amazing animal headlines in an all-new Drew's News: Dr. Drew-Little Edition. Then, competing viewers face-off in a Mac N Cheese cook-off you won't want to miss!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Daisy Jones and the Six" talk with Drew about their new show! They're chatting all about the 70's theme of the show, their time on set and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.desc: Drew is joined by Hillary Rodham Clinton and her daughter Chelsea Clinton, who share what it was like going on adventures for new docuseries, "Gutsy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Queen Latifah shares behind-the-scenes stories. Chris Appleton does music teacher's hair. Drew's News w/ Ross Mathews & Mikel Welch. TikToker Sarah T. shows hack for lamp cords.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Honk for Jesus" star Regina Hall joins Drew to chat. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Drew and Regina surprise one lucky audience member with a big prize!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is chatting with John Stamos! "A League of Their Own" star Abbi Jacobson is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to cover today's hottest headlines.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Ellie May loses another suitor to Miss Jane in another case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts accidentally run into a beatnik he moves into the Clampett mansion, but neither he nor they know what to make of each other.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: As a favor to Jed Mr. Drysdale arranges for a playboy bank director (who normally only dates women half his age) to come court Granny, while Jed goes out with a beautiful woman who dates rich older men.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants Jed to find a wife and asks for Mr. Drysdale's help. He introduces Jed to Phyllis but learns too late she a gold digger and becomes alarmed when they head to the track. But it's Granny they need to worry about.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to become a "double naught" spy and converts the family's truck into his idea of a Bondmobile. But he becomes the unwitting pawn in another banker's scheme.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's biggest rival John Cushing succeeds in getting the Clampetts to transfer all of their money to his bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drydale's poodle Claude is to enter a dog show but gets sick right before. Granny offers to doctor the dog but Ellie Mae is concerned he doesn't know any tricks so she decides to help out with one of her own pets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: John Brewster, the oilman from Tulsa, is bringing his new bride to California for their honeymoon. Somehow the Clampetts get the idea that their backyard rustic cabin is the ideal place for the Brewsters to stay.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the arrival of spring, the Countess returns for Granny's new batch of spring tonic. Granny thinks she's looking for a new husband and that Jed is her perfect match.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale owns a building that houses a beatnik's club. He hopes to get rid of them when they can't pay their rent but they find a new a sponsor: Jed Clampett.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed soon regrets helping out the beatniks with their money problems when Jethro, Elly May (and even Granny!) decide to join them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is appalled to learn that Jed is going door-to-door peddling his services as a handyman. But then he's apoplectic when he discovers that Jed has been hired by a rival bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A long time employee of the Commerce Bank is being forcibly retired to make way for a new computer system. A chance meeting with the Clampetts gives him an idea about dealing with Mr. Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Beauregard Short arrives in Beverly Hills from back home. Everyone assumes he's looking for a wife and Jethro decides to show him how to be like him, an international playboy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Brewster, the oil man who made Jed a multi-millionaire, arrives in Beverly Hills with his wife planning to build their dream house. Jed and Granny think they have the perfect house in mind for their dream home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is determined to go back home even if she has to walk back all by herself. When she reaches Las Vegas she has second thoughts. Jethro gets arrested by an undercover cop.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she has a new way of getting rid of the Clampetts: talk Jed into donating their mansion to the city for an art museum. They agree, on the assumption that they are supposed to provide the artworks and not move out.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny confuses Mrs. Drysdale's forays into astrology with the practice of black magic. An intended gift for Ellie Mae from Mr. Drysdale only adds to the confusion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is anxious to become a new "Double Naught" spy and Mr. Drysdale gives him his own office. A bank robber hopes to con an unwitting Jethro into helping him get into the bank vault.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When the Clampetts decide they want to go home for Possum Day, Mr. Drysdale attempts to put together a Possum Day in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks the Drysdale's young attractive maid is interested in him. He commences to courting her but she is actually interested in watching the football game on the Clampett's color TV.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's concocts a love potion for Elly Mae at the same time Mr. Drysdale hires an escort for Elly. Dean arrives at the mansion with the Clampetts believing he's Miss Jane's boyfriend so Granny tries a reverse spell.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Lucas Sebastian, a billionaire entrepreneur, wants Jed to invest in his new venture, undersea farming.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Farquar, Mrs. Drysdale's father comes for a visit. When he's alone with Drysdale, he reveals he's broke. It seems on his way over, he passed through Las Vegas and lost his whole fortune and is asking Drysdale for a handout, which he refuses.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Daddy Farquhar continues to visit the Clampetts' mansion to his daughter Margaret's displeasure. He has plans for Granny and her money in Las Vegas but she's expecting a marriage proposal.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E009) Sympathy and responsibility are at odds when Brenda volunteers for a teen crisis hotline.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E010) The chemistry between Brenda and Dylan starts to heat up when Brenda accidentally catches him in the shower, then comforts him after he fights with his father.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E011) Both Walsh twins face the temptation to drink alcohol when their peers are doing it all around them.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E012) Brandon gets an unexpected taste of fatherhood when he asks his classmate Melissa for a date-then has to baby-sit her infant son while she has a college interview.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E013) Pillow talk threatens to destroy Brenda's sleep-over as all the girls share their deepest secrets, with unexpected results.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E014) The Walsh's agree to let their maid's niece, Carla, use their address to enroll at West Beverly.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E015) A weekend in Palm Springs goes awry when David invites Steve, Kelly and Donna to join him at his grandparents' house while they're away on a cruise-but he gets the dates confused, and they're still there.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E016) Brandon is "discovered" when he's out roller-blading, landing a role as an emergency extra on a big TV show.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E017) Brenda's had it with home life and West Beverly and decides to leave both for the real world.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E018) The Walsh twins and all their friends are panicked by the upcoming SATs, but then everything gets put in perspective when Brenda finds a lump in her breast and faces a test no one can prepare for.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E019) Brandon interviews a classmate, Roger, who's an outstanding athlete and student--and haunted by the overbearing success of his father.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E020) Baseball fever strikes when Brandon is asked to coach a little league team after his dad gets injured.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S01E021) The drama and the stakes rise as the West Beverly High crew gets ready for their Spring Dance.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S02E001) Summer is here, and Brandon breaks the news to Nat that he is quitting his job at The Peach Pit.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Don starts his career as a piercer at 9Mag. Charmaine's mom gives her devastating news. Phor attempts to reconnect with family. Cobra gets turned on by her new roommate. Nikki goes ballistic when Phor's alleged cousin, Janelle, shows up. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Don freaks out after Ashley gives him news. Lily and Cobra come to blows. Van struggles to deal with the fallout from his breakup. When Ryan throws a party for Bone Thugs-n-Harmony, Charmaine seizes an opportunity to get her job back. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Lily jeopardizes her relationship with JR. Cobra confronts Ryan about a rumor. Van has a questionable plan to win Jenn back. Danielle throws a fashion show to help promote her new fashion blog. Ryan is rushed to the emergency room. Presented by VH1.

programme.desc: Ryan returns to the shop after a major health scare. JR learns disturbing information about his relationship with Lily. Phor questions his career as a tattoo artist. And Lily takes down Cobra after she meddles in her relationship. Presented by VH1.

programme.desc: Lily tries to turn the shop against Cobra. Charmaine's relationship is on rocky ground when her career takes priority over Neek. Nikki's jealousy rears its ugly head again. Don blows up after hearing the crew bully Cobra. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre una discrepancia en los restos de ADN al investigar el accidente de un avión militar que transportaba ataúdes.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS sigue buscando a un marine desaparecido; Gibbs y Ziva viajan a Afganistán, último lugar conocido del marine. Mientras tanto, Tony revela sus mayores temores y Gibbs revive momentos de su pasado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el padre de Tony es encontrado dentro de un auto con un cuerpo sin vida en el maletero, el equipo de NCIS debe determinar si es capaz de cometer un asesinato.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Genética
programme.desc: Cuando Eddie y Jamie se involucran demasiado en un complicado caso de adopción entre los padres biológicos y los padres adoptivos, piden a Erin que los ayude a resolver el conflicto sin ir a la corte.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Aún persiste
programme.desc: Cuando Danny acepta un trabajo extra como guardaespaldas para un ex convicto recién liberado que asumió la culpa por otra persona, aprovecha la oportunidad para ir tras el verdadero criminal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamada a Texas para realizar consultas sobre los asesinatos de prostitutas, la evidencia apunta a asesinatos con connotaciones religiosas. Pero a medida que profundicen en la investigación, el equipo podría poner en riesgo sus vidas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC continúa su investigación de asesinato en Texas y las pistas descubren una profunda red de corrupción que podría ser el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca respuestas cuando el actual esposo de la exesposa de Gibbs y Fornell es secuestrado de manera sospechosa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre una discrepancia en los restos de ADN al investigar el accidente de un avión militar que transportaba ataúdes.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The competitors test their best Run For A Million prospects at the NRBC in Katy, TX. Some riders are sliding away with big checks while others are realizing they might not have the caliber of horse they will need to take the top prize in Vegas.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the Run for a Million just around the corner, the top riders meet at the NHRA Derby for one final test before Vegas. The underdogs are out to prove they are a force to be reckoned with against the top contenders.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The moment has finally arrived as the sport's best riders gather in Vegas with their eyes on the top prize. The excitement and tension are high as these riders know that one perfect ride could change their lives forever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopefuls arrive at AT&T Stadium to start the rigorous audition process for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, competing for the fewest number of open spots ever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 101 remaining hopefuls must master tough choreography, learn the famous DCC kick line and impress judges Melissa Rycroft and Charm La'Donna.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates give panel interviews and solo performances before the rookies and veterans face off on the field and find out who makes it to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is on at training camp as both rookie and veteran candidates give it their all in front of their toughest audience yet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winner Tyce Diorio teaches the ladies to bring the magic as he puts them through a tough routine. Evan Miller challenges the DCC's power and musicality.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The DCC take the field for the first time in their signature DCC boots. Learning the DCC entrance proves very challenging for some, while others struggle to get accustomed to dancing in cowboy boots. Melissa Rycroft is featured.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The recruits do media training with NBC 5 Dallas-Fort Worth lead news anchors Meredith Land, Kelli, and Judy name two triangle points, and guest judge Melissa Rycroft sits in.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies put their modeling skills to the test on photoshoot day, Julia tries to bounce back after her car accident, and the dancers get a lesson in healthy cooking.

programme.desc: Aired 06/09/2019. Joshua “Gunner” Johnson struggles with PTSD and a spinal injury after being shot in 1994. Now, he wants to know why his friend would shoot him and kill another.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Security guards face wild threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A man is bit on the head and nearly faints. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man who claims he’s merely returning a bicycle to its owner is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Missouri police recover a stolen vehicle, a scuffle between two women at a bar escalates to biting, and a concerned neighbor places a possible domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to jump out of a car when his friend takes him on a high-speed chase, and a deputy investigates a man he finds walking down a dark road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman bites both the arresting officer and a store manager after getting caught stealing beer. The passenger of a suspicious vehicle is caught attempting to hide drugs in the seat. Police respond to a domestic abuse call involving a knife and two women.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies race against time to save a young boy who is trapped inside a house fire. An intoxicated patron demands a beer on credit and argues with a store clerk. An older woman struggles with heroin.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver foot bails from a still-rolling van and hides nearby. A teen on a dirt bike refuses to stop for Deputies. A man attempts to run from a traffic stop but gets hung up on a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to bargain with officers from a rooftop, a nightclub manager confronts the employee who stole his cash, and a talkative man insists he meant to get arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect attempts to flee from police, officers find a wanted man trespassing in someone's yard, and officers stop two people suspected of stealing a moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An innocent conversation turns into a high-speed motorcycle chase, a driver gets ratted out by his passengers, and a series of bad decisions land a young man in hot water.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Saundra is 58 and dating 28 –year-old Ernesto. She suspects he's cheating with her 38-year-old daughter! Then, a wedding is in danger when Shante caught her fiancé texting her niece! Did Kandi catch her fiancé Jason watching his own video?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Terrazina’s own brother Tyson thinks that Simon is not the father. Will Tyson prove she cheated and that Simon is not the father of her daughter? Then, William is in a heated debate with two women over the paternity of their children!

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Men Tested … Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Teshinya suspects that Clarence is picking up women at church and went undercover to get proof! Desirae is 17 and 5 months pregnant, but thinks her boyfriend Chris is cheating with her friend!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Could La’Nell be the grandmother of her sister-in-law Savanna’s baby if she slept with her teen son James? Plus, Sholonda told her husband that he might not be their daughter’s father, but after 17 DNA tests, they’re back today!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Maury Guest Updates…I'm Back with a Secret!
programme.desc: They ran, they ranted...but what happened when they went home? Today, some past guests return for more tests! Plus the winner of Maury’s Future Stars 2013 will be announced.

programme.desc: Charisma suspects her boyfriend Trey is sleeping with another woman…her cousin Kisha! Next, Jamie and Byron return with fresh cheating accusations about Byron! Will this on-and-off-again couple truly split when the results come out?

programme.desc: En 2002, una pequeña comunidad en el norte del estado de Nueva York quedó devastada cuando Patty Wlasiuk murió en un accidente de camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: De fotografía
programme.desc: Una adolescente de Modesto, California desapareció. No había señales de lucha en su casa y la policía sospechaba que ella simplemente se había escapado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Marcado de por vida
programme.desc: Un hombre que había cometido delitos, incluido el asesinato, no fue capturado. Casi 50 años después, los avances en la tecnología y el análisis de la escritura descubrieron al criminal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de seis años corrió y se escondió cuando vio que su abuela era golpeada hasta causarle la muerte, pero el hombre la siguió, la golpeó y la agredió. Ella dijo que el agresor era su tío, quien fue condenado. Se retractó de su testimonio años después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noche del 22 de Mayo de 1992, Betty Wilson regresó a casa después de una reunión y descubrió a su esposo tirado en un charco de sangre. Era evidente que Jack Wilson había sido asesinado – pero ¿cómo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una maestra dedicada y respetada desapareció, la policía tuvo que determinar si se había ido de vacaciones sin decírselo a nadie, o si era víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuarto Frío
programme.desc: Se recuenta la desaparición en 1987 de Tracy Jo Shine, residente de Houston. La investigación se enfrió hasta el 2000, cuando un 'escuadrón de casos sin resolver' se enteró de que el exnovio de la mujer, Michael Neal, se había jactado de haberla matado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un recuerdo conmovedor
programme.desc: Una niña inteligente de Visalia, California recuerda dejar huellas dactilares en el vehículo de su secuestrador cuando es secuestrada, lo que ayuda a la policía en su búsqueda junto con una huella de neumático en el barro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Lisa Manderach y su hija Devon dejaron su casa para ir de compras, pero no regresaron a la hora que se esperaba. El esposo de Lisa, Jimmy, llamó a la policía lleno de pánico para denunciar su desaparición y los dirigió a un centro comercial cercano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró el cuerpo de una mujer joven y una pequeña fibra en la ropa de la víctima llevó a la policía de San Diego directamente al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dentro de un cabello
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva al caso del violador de River Park, que asaltó a cuatro mujeres en South Bend, Indiana, durante 1996. Los agentes del orden arrestaron a Richard Alexander, quien fue declarado culpable en 1998 y sentenciado a 70 años de prisión.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: Having escaped from the ship, the Doctor and Jo find themselves stuck inside the workings of a giant machine. Can they find their way out?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies

programme.desc: Zanzibar is a land of giants. Isolated from mainland Africa these islands harbour some of the most unique animals with many being the largest found anywhere in the world.

programme.title: The Great Way
programme.desc: We travel to the Far East to discover the Kumano Kodo, an ancient pilgrimage through the sacred mountains and temples of Kumano on the Kii Peninsula, which take us to ancient and rural Japan on a spiritual path of purification.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: The environment of southern Europe and North Africa is the perfect territory for oak trees, huge trees whose branches may be home to more than 300 species of animals, from the critically endangered imperial eagle to colonies of storks, genets, and mice.

programme.title: Unlikely Animal Friends
programme.desc: An elephant holds vigil for a sick dog. A baby hippo chooses a giant tortoise as a surrogate parent. A lion instantly recognizes two men a year after their last encounter. And a lioness turns down an easy kill when she comes across a baby oryx.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Portobelo

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: As Nine encourages Sage to moderate his ambitions, Collette takes him on a journey into the past, to rediscover his artistic origins; Odalie finds it difficult to find balance in her love life and dance; Zo takes Tal out to have fun a night.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tal discovers a terrible family secret; Sage and the dancers develop a new and risky concept; Nine helps Rigo deal with his feelings for Poppy, while Poppy and Dondre confront their own feelings for each other.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Odalie tries to overcome an injury and preserve her place on the tour; Tal tries to relieve the guilt she feels and deserve Odalie's forgiveness; Rigo finds it difficult to maintain peace among his friends and find out who to trust.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: With Rigo's music about to go viral, Poppy is left with no choice but to respond; Collette takes control of the tour while Sage is away; Davis helps Uncle Al outside of work.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Bishop sends Lady Mae into a tailspin when he surprises her with divorce papers; Grace gives a newspaper interview in Mae's place, while deploying Darius to investigate Rochelle.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Lady Mae visits world-famous Pastor Maxine Patterson and endures the Bishop's final attempt to win her back at a Round Table party; Connie asks if Grace is interested in running Calvary.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Bishop and Lady Mae make alternate plans after Clara denies them the check for the IRS bill; Grace tends to Sophia when a medical emergency sends her daughter to the hospital.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Maxine Patterson visits Calvary during the same weekend that Lady Mae and the Bishop announce their divorce to the congregation; Grace and Rochelle find a case for their legal defense fund.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace questions her involvement in the Coralie Hunter case when the district attorney threatens to reopen her case with Mac; the Bishop and Lady Mae disagree on hosting A Day With Lady Mae at Calvary.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Bishop struggles to maintain his place within the family after another Zora crisis hits the Greenleafs; Grace attempts to convince Coralie not to take the district attorney's plea deal.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Angela and the feds pressure Tommy to flip on Lobos or spend his life in jail; Ghost faces consequences for trying to do the right thing.

programme.desc: Ghost deals with threats from Kanan and Angela's investigation as bodies continue to drop within his organization.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: James prepares to leave Ghost behind; Angela must choose between honor and love; Shawn's death leaves Tasha reeling; Tommy is forced to make bold moves.

programme.desc: Ghost ties up loose ends while dealing with new competition; Tommy confronts Tasha, who must learn to coexist with Angela; Tommy gains an adviser.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on the bottom ledge of plexiglass wall that is suspended over the water from a crane. Newlywed couples will have to tear apart a Fear Factor wedding cake filled with insects.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a beam above the water and must make their way around the structure. Contestant will climb through a plexi-glass tunnel. A struss structure will be wrapped by cargo netting and hung beneath a 212 helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A beam will be hung above another beam. Contestants are to devour the covered trays that conceal six different types of Fear Factor Sausage. Both team members will be seated in separate stunt cars on opposite ends of a track.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite skids of the same helicopter. Contestants are hogtied with duct tape on the floor of a meat locker. Contestants will be lying on their backs in a 72-foot-long trough on the roof of a building.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on the back of the fireboat. Contestant will have the option to drink up to three habanero pepper smoothie shots. One contestant will be standing at the top of a fire slide while their partner is standing at the slide-stairs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two large platforms are hanging below two helicopters. In this pairs stunt, each contestant will be seated in a barber chair. Contestants will each start out straddling the side of a container, at opposite ends, high in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Stunt takes place in a rectangular pig pen filled with pigs. Couple is placed back-to back and attached to an upright rotisserie. One contestant will be dragged through a field of mud.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be locked to a net that is dangling from the cargo load ramp of a Sikorsky helicopter over the water. Contestants must make their way through a maze. Contestants must climb into the back of a car that is slowly filling with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant is placed in a coffin, lowered into a grave, and their partner must free them. The contestants will be placed into a 7-foot deep Plexiglas tank divided into two sections and filled with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: For this Psycho Arc couples stunt, a hearse will be specially fabricated with a standing platform replacing the rear bumper. One contestant will be handcuffed to a shower inside a bathroom at the Bates Motel.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Team of two contestants will be in a four-walled roof-less office- type room that is filled with desks, chairs, filing cabinets, etc. Contestants will be bound in straight jackets and will have amount of time to escape.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Child contestant will be standing on top of the light tower while the parent is hanging from a helicopter. The parent contestant will be peddling a stationary bicycle. The child is standing on the roof and their parent is navigating through a maze.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two contestants will be driving a boat down a path while connected to a helicopter. Contestants will be on their knees inside a plexiglas tank. Contestants will be standing in a plexi box that is suspended over water.

programme.desc: Juan Pablo González nos ofrece una muestra de la cocina casera venezolana con recetas tradicionales, desde una sopa de calabaza reconfortante y saludable hasta un flan dulce de maracuyá.

programme.desc: ¿Cena por la noche con amigos? Las tapas los sacarán de apuros y el chef español Luis “Tigretón” León nos muestra cuatro platos tradicionales deliciosos.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Surquillo es reconocido por tener uno de los mercados más variados de Lima. El chef Kumar Paredes llega a este barrio en busca del pez desconocido del día: cachema.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Kumar visita Lince para probar un pescado que mucha gente conoce, pero pocos lo usan. Estamos hablando del bonito. ¿Te atreves a ver que preparan?

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Kumar fue a Santiago de Surco y había un pez que logró llamar su atención llamado chiri. Lo probará en tres platos diferentes para ver cómo queda. ¡Veamos el resultado!

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Breña es un distrito reconocido en Lima y nuestro carismático chef Kumar Paredes acudió a uno de los mercados de este distrito en busca de peje blanco. Seamos testigos de esta aventura.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Finaliza la primera temporada y volveremos a ver a Kumar en Santiago de Surco. Preparará un pescado en tres platos distintivos llamado fortuno. ¿Funcionará?

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Kumar está interesado en saber cuál es el sabor de la doncella, así que fuimos a Lince a buscar este pescado y verá que da como resultado tres platos que preparará. ¡Seamos parte de lo que viene a continuación, vamos!

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ubicado en Indiana, J. Willy's Bar and Grille está muy endeudado.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pasa por Café 36, un restaurante franco-estadounidense en Illinois.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay se dirige a Macomb Township, Michigan, para inspeccionar Giuseppe's.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Morgana grants real power to a washed-up magician in her latest attempt to destroy the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Sky must interrogate a notorious criminal when aliens that SPD has already captured attack the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Sky must face off with the criminal who was responsible for the loss of his father.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Piggy and friends steal SPD technology; the Rangers are sent to Zentor to train for SWAT mode.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Under the command of a tough drill sergeant, the Rangers must learn to work as a team before they can earn a powerful new weapons' technology.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: The Rangers nearly reach their breaking point when both Gruumm and Broodwing send robot after robot to attack the city.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Convinced that the Rangers no longer need her, Kat takes a top-level position at SPD Headquarters.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Gruumm takes The Terror to the past in an attempt to defeat Earth before SPD was formed.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Jack and Sky embark on a dangerous mission to stop an incoming meteor from destroying Earth.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Cruger's old rival teams up with Broodwing to take down the Rangers one by one.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: The teens grapple with failure after Cruger hails the A squad.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Jack needs to decide what he really wants to do with his life and the Rangers are dealt a shocking revelation.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: With Cruger captured, the A Squad is sent by Gruumm to finish off the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Omni descends to Earth and Gruumm makes his last stand against the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: A spell has been broken and evil is emerging to destroy the Earth. The sorceress Udonna needs to find 5 teens from Briarwood to take on the powers of the warriors of the past to fight the evil.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Xander, Vida, Chip, and Madison finally tap into their Mystic Force powers, but without a Red Ranger, Udonna and Clare know they are in trouble.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Chip and Vida think they can learn more spell codes by doing community service, but learn that real heroes are born in the face of danger.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Nick thinks Madison is too shy. When she gets turned to stone, Nick finds out he's wrong.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: The others think Nick stole some money. Nick hears voices in his head and finds out its Koragg. Koragg battles the Rangers and steals their Megazord power.

programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky tries to get a raise from his boss Mr. Littlefield but he is denied. Littlefield hires another act for the Tropicana and Lucy, Ethel and Fred decide to make sure no one shows up for the opening.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel's club must put on an operetta to commemorate its 25th anniversary. However, Lucy, the club treasurer, admits to Ethel that for the past couple of years, she has been mismanaging both the club's budget and her own household budget.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For the Mertzes' twenty-fifth wedding anniversary, Lucy and Ricky present them with a television set. As they are watching it, Ricky's constant adjustments cause the set to explode. Fred gets even by kicking in the Ricardos' TV set.

programme.title: Son of Bigfoot
programme.desc: Teenage outsider Adam sets off on a daring quest to find his long-lost father only to learn that he is the legendary Bigfoot! Adam soon discovers that he too has powers like his father, but an evil corporation who wants their DNA is hot on their trail!

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of time, when prehistoric creatures and woolly mammoths roamed the Earth, Early Man tells the story of Dug, a caveman and his trusty side-hog Hognob, as they unite the tribe against a new enemy to save their home.

programme.title: Missing Link
programme.desc: Mr. Link recruits explorer Sir Lionel Frost to help find his long-lost relatives in the fabled valley of Shangri-La. Along with adventurer Adelina Fortnight, this trio of explorers travel the world to help their new friend.

programme.title: Igor
programme.desc: In a world filled with Mad Scientists and Evil Inventions, one talented evil scientist's hunch-backed lab assistant has big dreams of becoming a Mad Scientist himself and winning the annual Evil Science Fair.

programme.title: Snoopy Come Home (CBS Legacy)
programme.desc: After Snoopy receives a mysterious letter from a girl named Lila, he hits the road with his best bird-friend Woodstock, evading danger at every turn, while Charlie Brown and the rest of the Peanuts gang are left wondering if his dog will ever return.

programme.title: Hotel for Dogs
programme.desc: An orphaned teen who secretly takes in stray dogs in an abandoned hotel. Based on Lois Duncan's novel.

programme.title: All Dogs Go To Heaven
programme.desc: A wonderful, song-filled feature about an unlovable, murdered mutt (Burt Reynolds) who returns to Earth to do a good deed. When he adopts an orphan girl who can communicate with animals and help lead him to his killer.

programme.title: Hotel for Dogs
programme.desc: An orphaned teen who secretly takes in stray dogs in an abandoned hotel. Based on Lois Duncan's novel.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers feel like they should be taking the fight to the Never Witch instead of training for R.E.M. trials. Zoey's haunted by her most painful memories and Mateo continues to only dream craft Z-Blob-related items.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Set in the past, the dream chaser duo Hannah and Beau argue while young Oz searches for Lunia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Zoey tries to rebuild a relationship with her estranged dad and Logan steps up his training to beat Astrid.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A close call with the Never Witch places Mateo in the forests of Wildoria while Beau is on an adventure in the dream world with Zoey.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A young park guest accidentally strands himself in the Pteranodon aviary, requiring Owen and a testy Stygimoloch to stage a daring rescue.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Rock star mathematician Ian Malcolm returns to Isla Nublar and helps Claire, Owen, and Hudson deal with strange power surges all over Jurassic World.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A Dilophosaurus runs loose in the park's hotel, and Owen and Claire must find it before the guests notice ... and before Vic's dino-hunting security team can damage the hotel and the guests!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Vic and Owen find themselves, along with Sinjin, in the middle of a massive dino-fight in the old Jurassic Park Visitor Center!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: It's déjà vu for Alan Grant as he returns to Isla Nublar and winds up stranded in the jungle during a dangerous storm with injured Simon and hero-worshipping Owen!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking in the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible ... but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic ... and extra dangerous!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro uses the Realm Crystal to open a portal to the Cursed Realm, ghosts take over the town - but the Ninja, in disguise, manage to get Lloyd to the center of the town and Lloyd steals the crystal…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the ghosts converge around and mobilize the Preeminent into a hulking giant behemoth, the Ninja use Airjitzu to fight the mobile beast in an attempt to slow it down.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the defeat of the ghosts and the destruction of the Cursed Realm, the ninja finds themselves famous all over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With Destiny’s Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny’s Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja breaks him out of jail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja’s search for Nadakhan’s ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan’s crew is struggling to handle an airship that used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Attempting to track the Never Witch using Oz's powerful telescope, the booby traps surprise the dream chasers at Oz and Albert's landing.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: When the dream chasers discover the eye of confusion's location, it kicks off a treasure hunt with the Never Witch's doppelgangers in hot pursuit.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
